slingshot_memory.content: Project uses npm workspaces for monorepo management with file: protocol for local package dependencies
Multi-brand architecture uses ThemeProvider with brandId prop to switch between brand themes dynamically
Design system follows Atomic Design pattern with atoms, molecules, organisms structure
Brand themes stored in packages/design-system/src/themes/{brandName}/ with colors and typography config
Component opt-in system uses config.json with brandOptIn flags and isComponentEnabled() for conditional rendering
New showcase screens: ComponentsScreen (all components demo) and ProfileScreen (realistic usage example)
Navigation uses React Navigation bottom tabs with themed tab bar matching brand colors automatically
Six new atomic components added: Card, Input, Switch, Badge, Avatar, Divider with brand theming via useTheme
HomeScreen transformed to ecommerce layout with SearchBar, TopMenuBar, ProductTile components
Brand-specific menu configs in brandMenuConfig.ts allow different menu items per brand (brandA: 6 items, brandB: 7 items)
Product grid uses 2-column responsive layout with 48% width tiles and flexWrap
New molecules folder created for composed components: TopMenuBar, ProductTile
Design system moved from packages/design-system to apps/mobile/src/design-system; tsconfig path alias updated to ./src/design-system
ComponentRegistry requires SearchBar, TopMenuBar, ProductTile imports and registry entries for all ecommerce components
Text.tsx fontWeight uses 'as any' type assertion to avoid StyleProp<TextStyle> compatibility issues with theme typography
